narrative:
Madison Twp township has 2,319 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
